title: Staylix Professional Hotel Booking Platform
description: A comprehensive full-stack hotel booking platform with real-time analytics, an AI-powered concierge chatbot, automated notifications, and payment processing.
highlights: AI Concierge Chatbot: Uses Groq AI (LLaMA 3.3) and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for smart guest assistance.
Real-time Dashboards: Integrated interactive analytics and data visualization using Recharts and Socket.IO.
Background Jobs: Implemented automated emails and notification queues using Redis and Bull Queue.
Integrations: Seamlessly connected Razorpay, Cloudinary storage, Open-Meteo weather forecasts, and Google OAuth.

title: Home-Byts On-Demand Home-Service Chef Marketplace
description: A location-aware, on-demand home-service marketplace web application to discover nearby chefs, view availability, schedule bookings, and complete payments.
highlights: Location-Based Discovery: Leveraged geolocation queries to dynamically filter and showcase nearby home chefs.
Time-Slot Scheduling: Designed a booking system with pricing calculations, slot selection, and collision check logic.
Centralized State: Structured application state using Redux Toolkit slices, custom React hooks, and localStorage persistence.
Integrations & Forms: Integrated Axios client wrappers, multi-step validations, Firebase storage, and modular component libraries.

title: Syshop Ecommerce website
description: A robust full-stack eCommerce marketplace powered by the MERN stack, featuring comprehensive product catalogs, secure token sessions, active shopping carts, and dynamic inventory lookups.
highlights: JWT Security Protocols: Configured user registration, password hashing using bcrypt, and token-based state authorization.
Inventory Management: Programmed complex database queries and aggregations in MongoDB to handle dynamic product listing.
Interactive Checkout: Developed interactive cart states, checkout panels, and customer summary listings using Redux slices.
Scalable REST Architecture: Designed modular Express routers, standard middleware error handlers, and Axios API configurations.

title: Coza Store - Premium E-Commerce Client UI
description: A premium retail eCommerce storefront client frontend implementing interactive search, central cart state management, slide-in filter panel, and high fidelity image galleries.
highlights: Interactive Shop Operations: Built shopping carts and watchlists with active count updates using Redux Toolkit slices.
Custom UI Carousels: Structured product gallery view models, filter cards, and image zooms using Slick and Lightbox2.
Vite Build Flow: Setup a responsive, lightning fast Single Page Application (SPA) skeleton optimized for mobile touch actions.
Responsive Styling: Integrated vendor animations and mobile layouts utilizing modular CSS styles.

title: Employee Management System
description: A React-based web application with separate dashboards for Admin and Employees. Features task management, user assignment, real-time updates, and stat tracking.
highlights: Separate Admin & Employee dashboards
Assign, complete, and track tasks in real time
Persistent session authentication with JWT

title: Real-Time WebSocket Chat Application
description: A real-time communication platform utilizing WebSockets for instant chat messaging and user-to-user interactions.
highlights: Instant bi-directional communication via Socket.IO
User status display (online/offline indication)
Chat history persistence with MongoDB
